game.title: Celeste
game.description:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall.
 
    
 
   A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery
   A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets
   Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers
   IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats
   Pie  The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils. 
 
  This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.

localized_description.text:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall.
 
    
 
   A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery
   A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets
   Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers
   IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats
   Pie  The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils. 
 
  This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.

Ayuda a Madeline a sobrevivir a los demonios de su interior en su viaje a la cima de la montaña Celeste;  un ajustadísimo plataforma diseñado a mano por los creadores del clásico multijugador TowerFall. 
 
    
 
   Aventura de un jugador marcada por la narración; un encantador elenco de personajes y un argumento conmovedor de descubrimiento personal.
   Gran montaña con más de 700 pantallas de duros desafíos y retorcidos secretos.
   Brutales capítulos "cara B" para desbloquear; para los más osados.
   Finalista en “Excellence in Audio” de IGF; más de 2 horas de música original con un asombroso piano y pegadizos ritmos de sintetizador.
   Pastel  
 Los mandos son sencillos y accesibles: salta, acelera en el aire y escala, pero con varias capas de profundidad de expresión que habrá que dominar, pues cada muerte enseña una lección. Las reapariciones relámpago te permiten seguir escalando mientras desvelas misterios y te enfrentas a numerosos peligros. 
 
  Es el momento, Madeline. Respira hondo. Tú puedes hacerlo.

Aidez Madeline à survivre à ses démons intérieurs au mont Celeste, dans ce jeu de plateformes ultra relevé fait à la main, réalisé par les créateurs du classique TowerFall. 
 
    
 
   Une aventure solo portée par une histoire touchante, avec des personnages pleins de charme et toute l’émotion de la découverte de soi
   Une énorme montagne avec plus de 700 écrans de défis ultra difficiles et de secrets sur plateformes
   Chapitres Face B à débloquer, conçus pour les alpinistes les plus courageux
   Finaliste de l’IGF pour son « Excellence en audio », avec plus de 2 heures de musique originale, un piano éblouissant et des rythmiques synthétisées accrocheuses
   Tarte fournie  
 Commandes simples et accessibles - il suffit de sauter, sprinter en l’air et grimper – mais toutes les couches à maîtriser font de chaque chute mortelle une leçon. Les renaissances rapides incitent à grimper pour découvrir les mystères de la montagne et à braver tous ses dangers. 
 
  Ça y est, Madeline. Respire bien. Tu peux le faire.

Hilf Madeline in dem reaktionsschnellen Plattformer der Macher des Multiplayer-Klassikers Tower Fall, beim Besteigen des Celeste ihre inneren Dämonen zu bezwingen.
 
    
 
   Ein story-betontes Einzelspieler-Adventure im charmanten Retro-Gewand mit schrulligen Charakteren und einer anrührenden Selbstfindungsgeschichte
   Ein gewaltiger Berg mit über 700 Abschnitten voller Hardcore-Herausforderungen und trügerischen Fallstricken
   Knüppelharte B-Seiten-Kapitel zum Freischalten, an die sich nur die unerschrockensten Kletterer wagen
   Finalist der IGF Competition „Excellence in Audio“ mit über 2 Stunden Originalmusik voll exzellentem Live-Piano und eingängigen Synth-Beats
   Kuchen  
 Die Steuerung ist simpel und leicht zugänglich – nur springen, sprinten und klettern. Dafür steigt der Schwierigkeitsgrad mit jedem Level - jeder Absturz ist eine Lektion. Die Abschnitte fangen sofort wieder von vorn an und halten dich bei der Stange, während du den Berg erklimmst und seinen vielen Gefahren trotzt.
 
  Los, Madeline. Atme einfach. Du schaffst das.

Ajuda Madeline a sobreviver aos seus demónios interiores na jornada até ao topo da Montanha Celeste neste jogo de plataformas dos criadores do clássico TowerFall. 
 
    
 
   Uma aventura com narrativa de um jogador, tal como a mamã costumava fazer, com um elenco de personagens encantadoras e uma história emocionante de auto-descoberta.
   Uma enorme montanha com mais de 600 ecrãs de complicados desafios de plataformas e segredos perturbadores.
   Capítulos paralelos brutais para desbloquear, criados apenas para os montanhistas mais corajosos.
   Finalista IGF no prémio "Excelência no Áudio", com mais de 2 horas de música original orquestrada por piano deslumbrante e ritmos sintéticos cativantes
   Torta  
 Controlos simples e acessíveis - saltar, trepar e rajada - mas com pormenores de mestria onde cada morte é uma lição. Com ressurgimentos ultra-rápidos, não irás parar de trepar enquanto descobres os mistérios da montanha e enfrentas os seus muitos perigos. 
 
  É isto, Madeline. Respira. Tu consegues.

Hjælp Madeline med at overleve sine indre dæmoner på rejsen til toppen af Celeste-bjerget i dette superskarpe, håndtegnede platformspil fra skaberne multiplayer-klassikeren TowerFall. 
 
    
 
   Et historiedrevet, enkeltspillereventyr som vor mor lavede dem med charmerende personer og en rørende historie om at finde sig selv
   Et kæmpe bjerg spækket med over 700 skærme med vilde platformudfordringer pg snedige hemmeligheder
   Brutale B-side-kapitler at låse op – kun til de modigste bjergbestigere
   IGF "Excellence in Audio"-finalist med over 2 timers original musik fyldt med smukt klaverspil og iørefaldende synthesizerbeats
   Tærte  
 Styringen er enkel og ligetil – det er bare at hoppe, løbe i luften og klatre – men med en stor dybde, hvor man må tage ved lære af hver eneste fejl. Lynhurtig respawning holder dig på sporet, mens du afdækker bjergets mysterier og overvinder dets pinsler. 
 
  Så er det nu, Madeline. Træk vejret. Du kan klare det.

Aiuta Madeline ad affrontare i suoi demoni in un viaggio verso la cima del Monte Celeste in un avvincente platformer fatto a mano dai creatori del classico multigiocatore TowerFall. 
 
    
 
   Un’avventura per singolo giocatore dalla forte componente narrativa come nei bei tempi andati, con personaggi carismatici e una commovente storia alla ricerca di sé
   Una montagna imponente da oltre 700 schermate, tra intense sfide formato platformer e impalpabili segreti
   Un lato B di spietati capitoli da sbloccare, per le scalate più ardite
   Finalista IGF come “Excellence in Audio”, con oltre 2 ore di musiche originali tra incantevoli brani al pianoforte e motivetti orecchiabili al sintetizzatore
   Crostate  
 I comandi sono alla portata di tutti – salta, scatta e scala – ma con vari livelli di difficoltà da padroneggiare, dove c’è da imparare a ogni morte. Prosegui la scalata tra rigenerazioni lampo, scova i misteri della montagna e sfida i suoi molteplici pericoli.
 
  Ci siamo, Madeline. Respira. Puoi farcela.

Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight platformer from the creators of TowerFall. Brave hundreds of hand-crafted challenges, uncover devious secrets, and piece together the mystery of the mountain.

Set on a fictional version of Mount Celeste, it follows a young woman named Madeline who attempts to climb the mountain, and must face her inner demons in her quest to reach the summit.
《Celeste》是《TowerFall》的制作者推出的又一力作。这款平台游戏节奏极为紧凑，玩家需要在 Madeline 攀登塞莱斯特山 (Celeste Mountain) 的旅程中，帮助她克服内心深处的恐惧。勇敢面对数百个手工打造的挑战场景，揭开诡异的秘密，解开神秘山峰的谜团吧。

game.title: Helltaker
game.description:
You woke up one day with a dream. Harem full of demon girls. You've opened the portal in hopes of fulfilling your wildest desires. Hellfire burns through your lungs, death awaits around every corner and everything looks like from a cutesy mobile game. You are in hell.
 
     Features:   Traverse hell in search of love.
   Win the hearts of horrible demon girls.
   Kick adorable skeletons around.
   Solve puzzles as efficiently as possible.
   Or just skip puzzles in the menu.
   Try to not get murdered by demon girls.
   Get murdered by demon girls anyway.

game.title: Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector
game.description: Roleplaying on the edge of a system in crisis. You are an escaped android, with a malfunctioning body, a price on your head and no memory of your past. Get a ship, find a crew, and keep both running as you navigate the shifting landscape of the Starward Belt. Can you build refuge among the stars?

game.title: Curse of the Dead Gods
game.description:
You seek untold riches, eternal life, divine powers - it leads to this accursed temple, a seemingly-infinite labyrinth of bottomless pits, deadly traps, and monsters.

Your greed will lead you to death, but that is not an escape. Rise to fight again. Delve deeper again. Defy the malignant deities that linger in this place. Battle through hordes of enemies in dark, cavernous passages filled with traps and secrets of all sorts - fire-spewing statues, explosives, hidden spikes, and worse.

Collect mystical Relics and an arsenal of weapons to make yourself unstoppable. Corruption builds in you with every step - encourage or ignore it, but each powerful curse can be a double-edged sword.

- A skill-based roguelike exploring a cruel, dark temple made of endless rooms and corridors
- Swords, spears, bows, guns - wield these and many more
- Unique curses influence each attempt, putting a twist on every action
- Dozens of enemies, with powerful champions and deadly bosses to face off against

game.title: Ye Guild Clerk!
game.description:
Ye Guild Clerk! is a short 2.5D, interactive narrative game, where you play as a newly hired guild clerk in a world full of cute animal adventurers! Perfect for players who love character-driven stories, cute animals, and cozy medieval fantasy worlds.
   
Features     

• Meet a cast of cute animal adventurers, each with their own stories  and quirks!
• Have  5 days to prove you're a good fit for the role! Or suffer the consequences and get fired...
• As a guild clerk, you'll  hand out quests, rewards and equipment! 

But be wary:
• Your choices matter, each action you take shapes the outcomes and stories for each adventurer you run into... for better or for worse!
• Over 40+ individual endings  between all of the adventurers you can meet!
• Decorate your clerk booth with various customizations and decorations! 
• Select from 3 different music tracks to listen to!
    
Controls:
• Point & Click Controls - Drag, Select, & Camera Movement
• WASD/Arrow Keys - Camera Movement
• Click/Space - Continue Dialogue
• ESC - Pause/Settings Menu

Please Note:       
There is no current way to save your progress. It is highly recommended to play in one sitting. The average playthrough can take from 35 - 50 minutes.

game.title: Purrgatory
game.description:
Purrgatory is a visual novel about passing time in an afterlife where nothing really matters. Explore a whimsical point-and-click world, get to know its downtrodden inhabitants, and remember — furever's not so bad!
      
  
   About Purrgatory  
    There's a cat in it! 
    Largely LGBTQ+ cast! 
    3-5 hours of cozy escapism! 
    7 charming and realistic characters! 
    80+ hand-drawn locations! 
    Multiple endings! 
    Too many cat puns to count! 
    They put it in a museum!!

localized_description.text:
Purrgatory is a visual novel about passing time in an afterlife where nothing really matters. Explore a whimsical point-and-click world, get to know its downtrodden inhabitants, and remember — furever's not so bad!
      
  
   About Purrgatory  
    There's a cat in it! 
    Largely LGBTQ+ cast! 
    3-5 hours of cozy escapism! 
    7 charming and realistic characters! 
    80+ hand-drawn locations! 
    Multiple endings! 
    Too many cat puns to count! 
    They put it in a museum!!

Purrgatory es una novela visual sobre pasar el rato en el más allá, donde ya todo importa poco. Explora un caprichoso mundo de point-and-click, conoce a sus oprimidos habitantes y recuerda: ¡tienes toda la eternidad para averiguar por qué el gato es dos veces animal!
   
  
      
  
   Sobre Purrgatory 
    ¡Hay un gato!
    ¡Un elenco mayormente LGBTQ+! 
    ¡De 3 a 5 horas de paz y evasión!
    ¡Siete personajes tan encantadores como realistas!
    ¡Más de 80 escenarios dibujados a mano! 
    ¡Varios finales alternativos! 
    ¡Chistes sobre gatos para dar y regalar! 
    ¡¡Lo han puesto en un museo!!

Purrgatory est un visual novel point-and-click sur la vie après la vie, dans un au-delà où rien n'a d'importance. Explorez un monde plein de fantaisie, apprenez à connaître les âmes torturées qui l'habitent, et ne vous inquiétez pas : même dans la mort, on retombe toujours sur ses pattes !
      
  
   À propos de Purrgatory  
    Il y a un petit chat dedans ! 
    Des personnages en majorité LGBTQ+ ! 
    3 à 5 heures de détente dans une atmosphère chaleureuse ! 
    7 personnages charmants et réalistes ! 
    Plus de 80 lieux dessinés à la main ! 
    Plusieurs fins possibles ! 
    Des jeux de mots sur les chats en veux-tu en voilà ! 
    Le jeu a été exposé dans un musée !!

Purrgatory is a visual novel about passing time in an afterlife where nothing really matters. Explore a whimsical point-and-click world, get to know its downtrodden inhabitants, and remember — furever's not so bad!
      
  
   About Purrgatory  
    There's a cat in it! 
    Largely LGBTQ+ cast! 
    3-5 hours of cozy escapism! 
    7 charming and realistic characters! 
    80+ hand-drawn locations! 
    Multiple endings! 
    Too many cat puns to count! 
    They put it in a museum!!

Purrgatory è una visual novel in cui bisogna passare il tempo in un aldilà in cui nulla ha più importanza. In questo gioco punta e clicca, esplora un mondo bizzarro, conosci i suoi peccaminosi abitanti e ricorda - purr sempre non è poi così male!
      
   
   
   Informazioni su Purrgatory  
    C'è un gatto! 
    Cast ampiamente LGBTQ+ 
    3-5 ore di escapismo cozy! 
    7 personaggi realistici e affascinanti! 
    80+ scene disegnate a mano! 
    Finali multipli! 
    Battute sui gatti a non finire! 
    L'hanno esposto a un museo!!

game.title: Cureocity
game.description:
JOIN US!   Feel free to join our  official Discord to share your ideas with us.
  X: @qiyudixiacheng
 
 
  About the Game  We are "Bread On Board," a collective of independent game developers spread across four countries, united by our passion and meeting during a GameJam. 
  Our game demo was born in the "BOOOM CHALLENGE", a GameJam by GCORES. With only 21 days, we created a game based on a given theme. After the competition, we even won the "Most Popular Game" award at an Online Game Trial Event.
  The full playthrough of our game will take about an hour. We hope to give you a short, but super heartwarming and loving adventure❤️.
  
     A rookie adventurer fresh on the scene and a former mercenary who was transferred into an adventurer due to injury. Two protagonists with contrasting personalities will embark on an adventure of fantasy and healing together. In the mysterious ruins of an underground dungeon that lies in the depth of a jungle, what awaits them will be...
  
        
     According to the tavern's adventurer logs, the team heading into the dungeon features a rookie adventurer and an ex-mercenary who is now working as a healer. The adventurer looks as charming as a doll, and the enthusiasm never disappears; the healer is cool and a bit traditional, acting as a guiding figure for their adventure.
  
        
  What stories have unfolded between these two contrasting characters, and what challenges will they face together in this adventure? The continuation of this adventurous story is yours to discover.
  
     "People think battles need powerful weapons, but strategy at hand is key." 
  
        
  In "Cureocity," the power of your strategy is materialized as the numerical values of your hands in combat. You can swap different weapons or items held in your left and right hands to alter your character's attack and defense stats. You may also change "gestures" to focus attacks or land heavy blows on specific enemies.As you delve deeper into the dungeon, you will take the unique traits of monsters into consideration and discuss strategies with your allies.
  
     In this adventure, you'll discover not only the secrets hidden within the dungeon, but also the truths about the world and the  characters themselves. When faced with contaminated monsters, you can choose to either fight them or attempt to purify them. Of course, you also have the option to let things take their own course.
  
        
  With each decision,the fate of the protagonists may change. The end of this adventure... is yours to decide.
  
  About the Publisher  GCORES PUBLISHING is an independent game publishing venture formed by GCORES, committed to bringing you more outstanding indie games from the BOOOM CHALLENGE.
  Feel free to follow our publisher webpage for future updates.

game.title: The Dark Queen of Mortholme
game.description:
Change is inevitable.  

Experience a macabre, short-form, second-person indie, you play as The Dark Queen of Mortholme, the final barrier between the Hero and the end credits. 
  
In this fixed-screen pixel art game, use the Queen's attacks against this hero, slay them, and quell this nuisance once and for all. 
  
But, wait. How is this possible? The Hero keeps coming back. 
   
Multiple Endings   
Depending on your dialogue choices, the story will play out differently. Will you see the Hero's point of view, or continue ruling as the Queen Everlasting?
        
   Features      

• Unleash Queenly Chaos: Wield the ever-evolving arsenal of the Dark Queen’s most devastating attacks.
• A Relentless Foe: Face a persistent Hero in a final showdown to end all final showdowns.
• Handcrafted Pixel Art:  Painstakingly designed for impeccable game feel. 
• A Haunting Score: Fall into the tones of the Dark Queen’s domain.
• Conquer and Collect: Unlock Steam Achievements as you slay this annoying hero!
• A Challenge Worth Finishing: Designed to be beaten in a single, emotional sitting.

• A Challenge Worth Finishing: Designed to be beaten in a single, emotional sitting.

El cambio es inevitable. 
 
Vive una experiencia macabra, de formato breve y en segunda persona: juegas como la Reina Oscura de Mortholme, la última barrera entre el Héroe y los créditos finales.

  En este juego de pixel art con pantalla fija, utiliza los ataques de la Reina contra el héroe, elimínalo y pon fin a esta molestia de una vez por todas.

  Pero… ¿cómo es posible? El Héroe sigue regresando.

Finales Múltiples   
Según las decisiones que tomes en los diálogos, la historia se desarrollará de forma diferente. ¿Verás el punto de vista del Héroe o continuarás gobernando como la Reina Eterna? 
        
   Características    

• Desata el Caos Real – Empuña el arsenal en constante evolución de la Reina Oscura con sus ataques más devastadores.
• Un Enemigo Implacable – Enfréntate a un Héroe persistente en el enfrentamiento final que lo cambiará todo.
• Pixel Art Artesanal – Diseñado con esmero para lograr una experiencia de juego impecable.
• Una Banda Sonora Inquietante – Sumérgete en los tonos oscuros del dominio de la Reina.
• Conquista y Colecciona – Desbloquea logros de Steam mientras eliminas a este molesto héroe.
• Un Desafío que Vale la Pena – Diseñado para completarse en una sola sesión cargada de emociones.

Le changement est inévitable.   

Plongez dans un jeu indépendant macabre, court et en narration à la deuxième personne, où vous incarnez la Reine Sombre de Mortholme, ultime rempart entre le Héros et le générique de fin.

  Dans ce jeu en pixel art à écran fixe, utilisez les attaques de la Reine contre ce héros, abattez-le et mettez un terme à cette nuisance une bonne fois pour toutes.

  Mais… attendez. Comment est-ce possible ? Le Héros revient sans cesse.

   Plusieurs fins 
  Selon vos choix de dialogue, l’histoire se déroulera différemment. Allez-vous adopter le point de vue du Héros ou continuer à régner en tant que Reine Éternelle ?
  
   Caractéristiques 

     • Déchaînez le chaos royal : Maniez l’arsenal en constante évolution des attaques les plus dévastatrices de la Reine Sombre.
     • Un adversaire implacable : Affrontez un Héros persistant dans l’ultime affrontement de tous les affrontements.
     • Pixel art artisanal : Conçu avec soin pour un ressenti de jeu impeccable.
     • Une bande-son envoûtante : Laissez-vous happer par les tonalités du domaine de la Reine Sombre.
     • Conquérez et collectionnez : Débloquez des succès Steam en éliminant ce héros agaçant !
     • Un défi à la hauteur : Conçu pour être terminé en une seule session intense et riche en émotions.

A mudança é inevitável.

Viva uma experiência macabra, em formato curto e em segunda pessoa: você joga como a Rainha Sombria de Mortholme, a última barreira entre o Herói e os créditos finais.

  Neste jogo de pixel art com tela fixa, use os ataques da Rainha contra o herói, elimine-o e ponha fim a essa perturbação de uma vez por todas.

  Mas... como isso é possível? O Herói continua voltando.

   Múltiplos Finais   
Dependendo das suas escolhas de diálogo, a história se desenrolará de maneira diferente. Você verá o ponto de vista do Herói ou continuará governando como a Rainha Eterna?

   Características    
• Libere o Caos Real – Empunhe o arsenal em constante evolução dos ataques mais devastadores da Rainha Sombria.
   • Um Inimigo Imparável – Enfrente um Herói persistente em um confronto final que encerrará todos os confrontos finais.
   • Pixel Art Feito à Mão – Projetado com precisão para uma experiência de jogo impecável.
   • Uma Trilha Sonora Assustadora – Mergulhe nos tons do domínio da Rainha Sombria.
   • Conquiste e Colecione – Desbloqueie Conquistas no Steam enquanto elimina este herói irritante!
   • Um Desafio que Vale a Pena – Feito para ser terminado em uma única sessão emocional.

Il cambiamento è inevitabile.

Vivi un'esperienza macabra, in forma breve e in seconda persona: interpreti la Regina Oscura di Mortholme, l'ultima barriera tra l’Eroe e i titoli di coda.

  In questo gioco a schermo fisso in pixel art, usa gli attacchi della Regina contro l’eroe, uccidilo e metti fine a questa seccatura una volta per tutte.

  Ma... com’è possibile? L’Eroe continua a tornare.

   Finali Multipli   
In base alle tue scelte nei dialoghi, la storia prenderà pieghe diverse. Vedrai il punto di vista dell’Eroe o continuerai a regnare come Regina Eterna?

   Caratteristiche    

• Scatena il Caos Reale – Brandisci l’arsenale in continua evoluzione della Regina Oscura con i suoi attacchi più devastanti.
   • Un Nemico Inarrestabile – Affronta un Eroe persistente in uno scontro finale che mette fine a tutti gli scontri finali.
   • Pixel Art Artigianale – Curata nei minimi dettagli per un’esperienza di gioco impeccabile.
   • Una Colonna Sonora Inquietante – Abbandonati alle sonorità del dominio della Regina Oscura.
   • Conquista e Colleziona – Sblocca gli Obiettivi di Steam mentre abbatti questo fastidioso eroe!
   • Una Sfida da Concludere – Progettato per essere completato in un’unica, intensa sessione.

game.brief:
Change is inevitable.  

Experience a macabre, short-form, second-person indie, you play as The Dark Queen of Mortholme, the final barrier between the Hero and the end credits. 
  
In this fixed-screen pixel art game, use the Queen's attacks against this hero, slay them, and quell this nuisance once and for all. 
  
But, wait. How is this possible? The Hero keeps coming back. 
   
Multiple Endings   
Depending on your dialogue choices, the story will play out differently. Will you see the Hero's point of view, or continue ruling as the Queen Everlasting?
        
   Features      

• Unleash Queenly Chaos: Wield the ever-evolving arsenal of the Dark Queen’s most devastating attacks.
• A Relentless Foe: Face a persistent Hero in a final showdown to end all final showdowns.
• Handcrafted Pixel Art:  Painstakingly designed for impeccable game feel. 
• A Haunting Score: Fall into the tones of the Dark Queen’s domain.
• Conquer and Collect: Unlock Steam Achievements as you slay this annoying hero!
• A Challenge Worth Finishing: Designed to be beaten in a single, emotional sitting.

game.title: DYO
game.description:
DYO is an award-winning local co-op puzzle platformer for one or two players in which you navigate two Minotaurs through a seemingly impassable maze and solve mind-bending puzzles. Each Minotaur is trapped in their half of the split screen – but only in a combined effort can they escape the cursed labyrinth.
 
       
 
 In this impossible maze, you can merge both halves of the split screen into one and thus hop from one side of the screen over to the other. Use this ability to your advantage! It’s up to you to rearrange and manipulate the level structures of 30 carefully crafted levels in order to carve out a path to the exit. Many have tried to figure out the numerous mind-boggling challenges hidden in the depths of this cursed labyrinth. Will you be the first to solve them?
 
        Team DYO DYO started out as a holiday project of four Game Design students in 2014. Since then, DYO has come a long way: It’s 2018 and – after winning several awards and having been exhibited all over the world – DYO is now finally available on Steam. So grab a copy, grab a friend and get ready for 30 levels of mind-bending puzzle action! Features   Good old local co-op fun for 1 or 2 players.
   Merge and split your screens to manipulate the level around you.
   No precision platforming. No enemies. No timers. Just you and your brains.
   30 levels (3-4 hours of playtime) of mind-bending puzzles and more to come.
   Find multiple solutions to each level (some of which not even the devs might know of).
   Don't have two controllers to play with your friend? You can also play on one shared controller!   Recommendation For the best DYO experience, we recommend playing with a friend!

DYO es un juego galardonado para una o dos personas donde navegan dos minotauros a través de un laberinto lleno de rompecabezas. Cada minotauro parece atrapado en su parte de la pantalla, pero con esfuerzo combinado ojalá alcanzan a escapar del laberinto.
 
       
 
 Con solo presionar un botón, las dos partes de la pantalla divida se dejan unir y se puede saltar entre ellos. Si usan esta capacidad en manera astuta, pueden dar nueva forma a los 30 niveles y abrirse paso a la salida. Ya mucha gente ha intentado a resolver los rompecabezas increíbles. Van a ser los primeros que alcanzan?
 
        Características   Juego cooperativo local para 1-2 personas.
   Combine y separa las dos partes de la pantalla divida para manipular los niveles.
   No hay enemigos. No hay minutero. Solo vosotros y los rompecabezas.
   30 niveles (3-4 horas de juego) de rompecabezas.
   Hay diferentes soluciones para cada nivel.
   No tienen dos controladoras para jugar? Se puede compartir una controladora entre dos personas!   Recomendación Para la experiencia optima de DYO, recomendamos jugar con otra persona!

Couronné d’un prix,  DYO est un jeu casse-tête coopératif pour un ou deux joueurs dans lequel deux minotaures doivent être dirigés à travers un labyrinthe infranchissable. Chaque minotaure est emprisonné dans sa moitié d’écran. Or les minotaures doivent unir leur force pour s’échapper de ce labyrinth.
 
       
 
 En appuyant sur un bouton vous pouvez connecter les deux moitiés de l’écran pour former un écran commun dans lequel les deux minotaures peuvent sauter d’ un bout à l’autre. C’est donc à vous de reconfigurer et de manipuler intelligemment les trente niveaux, soigneusement tracés à la main, pour optimiser vos chances de trouver le chemin vers la sortie. Prenez garde: les profondeurs de ce labyrinthe regorgent de défis! Serez-vous le premier à les relever?
 
        Team DYO Crée dans le cadre d’un projet de vacances universitaires de quatre étudiants de Game Design en 2014, DYO a depuis parcouru un long chemin: après avoir remporté plusieurs prix et avoir été exposé partout dans le monde, il est enfin disponible sur Steam. Alors prenez une copie, invitez un ami et préparez-vous à trente niveaux de casse-têtes! Caractéristiques:   Option mode co-op pour deux joueurs ou mode solo.
   Fusion et division des écrans pour manipuler le niveau autour de vous.
   Aucune plate-forme de précision. Pas d’ennemis. Aucun minuteur. Juste vous et vos méninges.
   30 niveaux (3-4 heures de temps de jeu) de casse-têtes et d’autres à venir.
   Solutions multiples à chaque niveau. (dont certaines ont échappé à notre connaissance!)
   Vous n’avez pas deux contrôleurs sous la main? Pas de problème! Vous pouvez jouer avec un contrôleur commun (ou naturellement aussi sur votre clavier d’ordinateur)   Recommandation Pour la meilleure expérience DYO nous vous recommandons de jouer avec un ami!

DYO ist ein preisgekröntes co-op Game für ein oder zwei Spieler, bei dem zwei Minotauren durch ein unwegsames Labyrinth geführt werden müssen. Jeder Minotaurus ist in seiner eigenen Bildschirmhälfte gefangen. Doch um aus dem verwunschenen Labyrinth entfliehen zu können, müssen beide Minotauren mit vereinten Kräften arbeiten!
 
       
 
 Per Knopfdruck lassen sich die beiden Bildschirmhälften zu einem gemeinsamen Bildschirm zusammenführen, in dem sich beide Minotauren frei bewegen können. Als Spieler*in ist es deine Aufgabe, die 30 sorgfältig gefertigten Levels durch geschicktes positionieren der Bildschirmhälften neu zu arrangieren, um so einen Weg zum Ausgang zu kreieren. Doch Obacht! In den Tiefen dieses verwunschenen Irrgartens lauern knifflige Herausforderungen. Könnt ihr dem Labyrinth entfliehen?
 
        Team DYO Wir sind vier ehemalige Game Design Studenten. 2014 haben wir DYO als Nebenprojekt in unseren Semesterferien gestartet. Seitdem hat sich viel getan: Angefangen als kleiner Prototyp, hat DYO mittlerweile mehrere Awards gewonnen und wurde weltweit auf Events und Messen ausgestellt. Jetzt – vier Jahre später – ist DYO endlich fertig und auf Steam erhältlich! Also schnapp dir eine*n Freund*in und mache dich bereit für 30 Gehirnschmauserlevel. Features   Couch co-op für 1 oder 2 Spieler*innen.
   Verbindet und teilt die Split Screen Hälften, um das Level um euch herum zu manipulieren.
   Keine Gegner. Kein Zeitlimit. Nur Köpfchen!
   30 Levels voll kniffliger und verquerer Puzzle-Action.
   Vielzählige Lösungswege für jedes Level (einige kennen nicht mal wir selbst).
   Keine zwei Controller zur Hand? Kein Problem – DYO lässt sich gemeinsam auf einem Controller spielen (und natürlich auch auf der PC-Tastatur).   Recommendation DYO hat sowohl einen 1- als auch einen 2-Spieler Modus. Für das beste DYO Erlebnis empfehlen wir, DYO gemeinsam mit einem Freund oder einer Freundin zu spielen!

game.title: Antimatter Dimensions
game.description:
Antimatter Dimensions is a highly unfolding Idle Incremental game with multiple layers of unlocks, prestige, and achievements. The basic goal is to reach Infinity and receive an Infinity point, which can be spent on various upgrades to increase your overall production. After Infinity the game has just begun, as there are much, much more to discover.
 
    2 years of updates, then 4 years of pretending to update behind the scenes
    Multiple challenges, ranging from minor alterations to major challenges that forever change the way you play the game
    100 Steam achievements, but even more in game!
    Less than a hundred perks, 0 talent and some miscellaneous upgrades too complex to go into detail about
    An obscene amount of automation, including a custom scripting language. AD also happens to be about unlocking new stuff and automating all stuff.
    Helpful tutorials in the helpful help page.
    Two black holes to explore, 0 mini games, 4 “pets”. If your glyphs start speaking to you, please see a doctor
    We added a shop!  
 Antimatter Dimensions was originally created in 2016 by Hevipelle as a web based game, however it's development has since expanded to have multiple developers, and even more testers. During the first years, it was updated rather often, sometimes updates within 5 hours of each other. But after the Dilation update in 2018, Hevipelle and the team started working on the Reality update. Over 4 years later, the update is finally out, along with the Steam version of the game!

    We added a shop!  
 Antimatter Dimensions was originally created in 2016 by Hevipelle as a web based game, however it's development has since expanded to have multiple developers, and even more testers. During the first years, it was updated rather often, sometimes updates within 5 hours of each other. But after the Dilation update in 2018, Hevipelle and the team started working on the Reality update. Over 4 years later, the update is finally out, along with the Steam version of the game!

Antimatter Dimensions is a highly unfolding Idle Incremental game with multiple layers of unlocks, prestige, and achievements. The basic goal is to reach Infinity and receive an Infinity point, which can be spent on various upgrades to increase your overall production. After Infinity the game has just begun, as there are much, much more to discover.
 
    2 years of updates, then 4 years of pretending to update behind the scenes
    Multiple challenges, ranging from minor alterations to major challenges that forever change the way you play the game
    100 Steam achievements, but even more in game!
    Less than a hundred perks, 0 talent and some miscellaneous upgrades too complex to go into detail about
    An obscene amount of automation, including a custom scripting language. AD also happens to be about unlocking new stuff and automating all stuff.
    Helpful tutorials in the helpful help page.
    Two black holes to explore, 0 mini games, 4 “pets”. If your glyphs start speaking to you, please see a doctor
    We added a shop!

game.title: Ogu and the Secret Forest
game.description:
Explore the wonderful world with baby Ogu!
  
'Ogu and the Secret Forest' is a 2D adventure game with hand-drawn characters and various types of puzzles.
  
Befriend bouncy characters and defeat strange creatures to unravel the mystery of the charming world.

   Features            

• Explore various types of areas. Each area has a unique atmosphere and story. 

• Solve puzzles and find hints to reveal secrets and mysteries that are undisclosed for a long time. From recognizable classic puzzles to unique ones, various types of puzzles are waiting for you to visit. 

• The power of the Great One has been shattered and lots of vicious adversaries are keen on gathering the scattered pieces of the Great One’s power. Overcome these fearsome enemies to save the world.
  
• Hats and Masks: Put on your explorer’s hat and go find various awesome hats and masks! Dress Baby Ogu with these items and some of them might have some special skills attached. 
  
• Drawings: There are many landmarks out there. Draw fancy objects and landscapes to discover new lands and you might also find hints in them.
  
• Meet friends on your journey and help those in need. They might help you with their unique skills or gifts. You’re not alone in this world!

localized_description.text:
在2D冒险游戏《奥咕与秘密森林》里和奥咕宝宝一起探索奇妙世界！手绘角色，多种谜题。和激萌小动物成为朋友，打败异界怪物，揭开未知世界的秘密！
  
   特点            
  在游戏中，每个区域都有独特的氛围和故事，等待你来冒险。解开谜题，找到揭露尘封已久的神秘事物和隐藏秘密的线索。
  
           
  从家喻户晓的谜题到游戏独特谜题，多种谜题等你来挑战！
  
           
  神之力分崩离析，散落世界各地。而邪恶的生灵们则非常热衷于寻找这些神之碎片。为了拯救世界，打败它们吧！
  
           
   帽子和面具    戴上你的探险者帽，去寻找多种多样的帅气帽子和面具！用这些帽子和面具装扮奥咕宝宝，其中部分帽子和面具可能会有特殊技能哦！
   绘画   游戏中有许多地标和美丽的风景，将它们画下来，发现新的地域，说不定还能在里面找到线索！
   朋友   在冒险旅途中也别忘了交朋友！帮助他们解决难题，他们也会用自己的特殊技能和小礼物为你解决燃眉之急。在这个世界里，你不是孤军奋战！

在2D探險游戲《奧咕的探險生活》一起和奧咕寶寶探索奇妙世界吧！手繪角色，多種謎題，和激萌小動物成爲朋友，打敗異界怪物，解開未知世界的秘密！
  
   特點            
  在游戲中，每個區域都有獨特的氛圍和故事，等待你來探險。解開謎題，找到揭露封塵已久的神秘事物和隱藏秘密的綫索。
  
           
  從家喻戶曉的謎題到游戲獨特謎題，多種謎題等你來挑戰！
  
           
  神之力已分崩離析，散落世界各地，而邪惡的生靈們則非常熱衷於尋找這些神之碎片。爲了拯救世界，打敗他們吧！
  
           
   帽子和面具    戴上你的探險帽，去尋找多種多樣的帥氣帽子和面具！用這些帽子和面具裝扮奧咕寶寶，其中部分帽子和面具可能會有特殊技能哦！
   繪畫   游戲中有許多地標和美麗的風景，將它們畫下來，發現新的地域，説不定還能在裡面找到綫索！
   朋友   在探險旅途中也別忘了交朋友！幫助他們解決難題，他們也會用自己的特殊技能和小禮物爲你解決燃眉之急。在這個世界裡，你不是孤軍奮戰！

Explore the wonderful world with baby Ogu!
  
'Ogu and the Secret Forest' is a 2D adventure game with hand-drawn characters and various types of puzzles.
  
Befriend bouncy characters and defeat strange creatures to unravel the mystery of the charming world.

   Features            

• Explore various types of areas. Each area has a unique atmosphere and story. 

• Solve puzzles and find hints to reveal secrets and mysteries that are undisclosed for a long time. From recognizable classic puzzles to unique ones, various types of puzzles are waiting for you to visit. 

• The power of the Great One has been shattered and lots of vicious adversaries are keen on gathering the scattered pieces of the Great One’s power. Overcome these fearsome enemies to save the world.

• Meet friends on your journey and help those in need. They might help you with their unique skills or gifts. You’re not alone in this world!

Ogu y el Bosque Secreto es un juego de aventuras en 2D creado por un equipo de cuatro personas, cuenta con personajes dibujados a mano y diferentes tipos de rompecabezas.

  Hazte amigo de personajes alegres y derrota a extrañas criaturas para desentrañar el misterio que oculta este fascinante mundo.

   Características            

• Explora diversas regiones. Cada una de ellas tiene una atmósfera e historia únicas.

• Resuelve puzles y encuentra pistas para revelar secretos y misterios que llevan mucho tiempo sin ser desvelados. Desde clásicos rompecabezas reconocibles hasta otros únicos, te esperan diferentes tipos de puzles.
  
• El poder del Gran Ser se ha hecho añicos, y montones de despiadados adversarios están deseosos de reunir los fragmentos dispersos de su poder. Derrota a estos temibles enemigos para salvar el mundo.
  
•  Sombreros, Gorros y Máscaras   
¡Ponte tu sombrero de explorador y ve a buscar asombrosos sombreros, gorros y máscaras! Viste a Bebé Ogu con estos objetos. Algunos de ellos podrían incluir alguna habilidad especial.
   
• Dibujos   
Hay muchos lugares emblemáticos por el mundo. Dibuja fantásticos paisajes para descubrir tierras nuevas, y puede que también encuentres pistas en ellos. 
  
• Conoce a muchos amigos en tu viaje y ayuda a los que necesiten de ti. Puede que te ayuden con sus habilidades únicas o con regalos. ¡No estás solo en este mundo!

"Ogu et la Forêt secrète" est un jeu d'aventure en 2D créé par quatre personnes avec des personnages dessinés à la main et des puzzles variés. Liez-vous d'amitié avec des personnages pleins d'entrain et battez d'étranges créatures pour percer le mystère d'un monde charmant.
  
 Fonctionnalités            

• Explorez différentes zones variées. Chaque zone a une atmosphère et une histoire uniques.

• Résolvez des énigmes et trouvez des indices pour révéler des secrets et mystères restés longtemps cachés. Des puzzles classiques aux puzzles uniques, de nombreux énigmes à résoudre vous attendent.
  
• Le pouvoir du Dieu a été brisé et maints ennemis malveillants ambitionnent de rassembler les morceaux dispersés dans le monde. Terrassez ces redoutables ennemis pour sauver le monde.
  
• Chapeaux et Masques   
Enfilez votre chapeau d'explorateur et partez à la recherche de nombreux chapeaux et masques incroyables ! Habillez bébé Ogu avec ces objets, certains d’entre eux pourraient recéler des compétences spéciales. 
   
• Dessins   
Il existe de nombreuses marques. Dessinez des objets et des paysages fantaisistes pour découvrir de nouvelles contrées et peut-être de nouveaux indices. 
  
• Rencontrez des amis pendant votre voyage et aidez des habitants. Ils pourraient vous aider dans votre quête avec leurs compétences. Vous n'êtes pas seul au monde !

„Ogu und der geheime Wald" ist ein 2D-Abenteuerspiel, das von einem vierköpfigen Team entwickelt wurde. Es begeistert mit handgezeichneten Charakteren und verschiedenen Arten von Rätseln.

  Freunde dich mit quirligen Charakteren an und besiege sonderbare Kreaturen, um das Geheimnis der bezaubernden Welt zu lüften.
  
Inhalte            

• Erforsche verschiedene Arten von Gebieten. Jedes Gebiet hat eine einzigartige Atmosphäre und Geschichte.

• Löse Rätsel und finde Hinweise, um Geheimnisse und Mysterien zu lüften, die lange Zeit unentdeckt blieben. Von bekannten klassischen Rätseln bis hin zu einzigartigen Rätseln warten verschiedene Arten von Rätseln auf dich, die du lösen musst.
  
• Die Macht des Großen ist zerbrochen und viele bösartige Gegner sind scharf darauf, die verstreuten Teile der Macht des Großen zu sammeln. Überwinde diese furchterregenden Gegner, um die Welt zu retten. 
   
• Hüte und Masken   
Setz deinen Entdeckerhut auf und mach dich auf die Suche nach verschiedenen tollen Hüten und Masken! Kleide Baby Ogu mit diesen Objekten ein, denn einige von ihnen können besondere Fähigkeiten haben. 
   
• Gemälde   
Da draußen gibt es viele Wahrzeichen. Zeichne ausgefallene Gegenstände und Landschaften, um neue Länder zu entdecken. Vielleicht findest du in ihnen auch Hinweise. 
  
• Triff Freunde auf deiner Reise und hilf denen, die in Schwierigkeiten sind. Sie können dir mit ihren einzigartigen Fähigkeiten oder Gaben helfen. Du bist nicht allein in dieser Welt!

【ゲームプレイ動画の配信ガイドライン】 
  動画やライブ配信の公開と収益化について、個人・法人を問わず許可します。概要欄にストアページのリンクを掲載していただけると助かります。 
   
        
  ちびオグと一緒に秘密と驚きに満ちた世界を冒険しましょう！ 
  「オグと秘密の森」は人気のキャラクター「オグ」を作ったMoonLab StudioとSinkhole Studioが開発した2Dアドベンチャーゲームです。ちびオグと一緒に200個以上のマップを冒険しながら新しい友達を作り、敵を倒したり、謎を解いてみましょう!
  
  
   特徵            
  それぞれ異なる話と雰囲気の地域を探検してみてください。
  問題を解決し謎を探していると、長年隠されていた話が開かれます。
  
  
           
  馴染みのパズルから独特なコンセプトのパズルまで、色んな形のパズルがあなたを待っています。 
  
   
           
  偉大なる力がいくつかに分かれ、多くの敵がその力を狙っています。
  恐ろしい敵たちを倒して、世界を救ってください。 
   
  
           
   帽子と仮面   あなたの探検帽子ほど素敵で可愛い様々な帽子と仮面を探してみてください！
  各種類の装備でちびオグを可愛く飾ったり隠された特別な力を使うこともできます。 
    
  
   絵日記   秘密の森には様々な見どころが満載です。
  絵日記を描いて素敵な風景を記録し、ヒントを得てみてください。 
   
  
   友達   困っている者を手伝い、友達になりましょう。
  秘密の森について様々な話を聞いたり、助けを求めることもできます。

"Ogu e la Foresta Segreta" è un gioco di avventura 2D creato da un team di quattro persone, caratterizzato da personaggi disegnati a mano e diversi tipi di enigmi. Stringi amicizia con personaggi saltellanti e sconfiggi strane creature per svelare i segreti di questo mondo fantastico.
  
Caratteristiche            

• Esplora diverse zone. Ogni zona ha la sua atmosfera e la sua storia.

• Risolvi gli enigmi e trova gli indizi per svelare i segreti e i misteri rimasti a lungo nascosti. Dai classici enigmi a quelli unici, diversi tipi di rompicapo ti aspettano.
  
•  Il potere del Più Grande è frammentato e molti nemici feroci sono pronti a raccoglierne i pezzi. Supera questi temibili nemici per salvare il mondo.

•  Cappelli e Maschere   
Indossa il cappello da esploratore e scopri fantastici cappelli e maschere. Vesti il piccolo Ogu con questi oggetti, alcuni di essi avranno abilità speciali integrate. 
   
• Disegni   
Ci sono molti punti di riferimento là fuori. Disegna vestiti eleganti e paesaggi per scoprire nuove terre, potresti anche trovare degli indizi. 
  
• Incontra amici sulla tua strada e aiuta chi ne ha bisogno. Gli amici potranno aiutarti con le loro abiità uniche o con dei regali. Non sei solo a questo mondo!

game.title: Papers, Please
game.description:
The communist state of Arstotzka has just ended a 6-year war with neighboring Kolechia and reclaimed its rightful half of the border town, Grestin. Your job as immigration inspector is to control the flow of people entering the Arstotzkan side of Grestin from Kolechia. Among the throngs of immigrants and visitors looking for work are hidden smugglers, spies, and terrorists. Using only the documents provided by travelers and the Ministry of Admission's primitive inspect, search, and fingerprint systems you must decide who can enter Arstotzka and who will be turned away or arrested.

The gameplay of Papers, Please focuses on the work life of an immigration inspector at a border checkpoint for the fictitious Eastern Bloc country of Arstotzka. The player inspects would-be immigrants' documents and uses a sparse array of tools to determine whether the papers are in order for the purpose of keeping spies, smugglers and other unwanted individuals out of the country. At the end of each in-game day, the player earns money based on how many immigrants they processed less any penalties for mistakes, and then must decide on a simple budget to spend that money on rent, food, heat, and other necessities in low-class housing for themselves and their family. As relations between Arstotzka and nearby countries deteriorate due to multiple terrorist attacks, each day introduces a new set of rules for immigration based on the game's story, such as denying citizens of specific countries or demanding more exacting identification from citizens. The player may be challenged with moral dilemmas and social engineering as the game progresses; such as allowing the supposed spouse of one immigrant through despite them lacking complete papers, even though they may be planning to attack your fellow guards.
A mysterious anti-government organisation also appears, with several of its members appearing in the checkpoint, giving the inspector orders on what to do in order to help the organisation bring down the government and establish a new one; the player can choose whether or not to help this organisation.
The game has a scripted story mode with multiple possible endings depending on the player's previous actions, as well as an unlockable, randomized endless-play mode.
Papers, Please has been praised by the sense of immersion provided by the game mechanics, and the intense emotional reaction.[12] CBC News' Jonathan Ore called Papers, Please a "nerve-racking sleuthing game with relentless pacing and dozens of compelling characters - all from a desk job"

game.title: The Sims 3
game.description:
In The Sims 3, you can create Sims with unique personalities, fulfill their desires, and control their lives within a customizable living neighborhood. Unlock all-new Karma Powers and unleash them on your Sims: help your Sim get lucky with the power of "love connector", bless them with the power of "age defiler" or "instant beauty" or curse them with an "instant enemy". Use these powers wisely, because they may have unexpected results! As you guide your Sims through life, you can complete challenges to unlock additional items, new buildings and landmarks.

Create over a million unique Sims and control their lives. Customize everything from their appearances, to their personalities and even the home of their dreams. Then, send your Sims out to explore new locations around town and to meet other Sims in the neighborhood. With all-new quick challenges and rewarding game play, The Sims 3 gives you the freedom to choose whether (or not!) to fulfill your Sims’ destinies and make their wishes come true.

Powerful character design tools let you make exactly who you want. Robust building features allow for precise control over your Sims' home. And your Sims can explore a huge neighborhood to their heart’s content. Day or night, work or play, the world is your Sims' oyster.

It’s easy and fun to make your unique Sims look just right. From the face and body shaping options to the vast and ever-growing range of clothing choices to the intriguing personality types, you can create the character of your dreams… or even make yourself!

Sims can roam freely throughout the town. Visit the local bistro, check out the new nightclub, get a few reps in at the gym, whatever strikes your Sims' fancy is theirs to pursue… and they’ll never have to wait in line!

Whether or not you believe in destiny, you can help your Sims achieve their dreams. During their lifetimes, Sims will want different things based on their individual personality traits. Fulfilling these desires gets you points to spend purchasing new items for your Sims. And it’ll give you a nice warm feeling, too.

Unlock all-new Karma Powers and unleash them on your Sims: help your Sim get lucky with the power of "love connector", bless them with the power of "age defiler" or "instant beauty" or curse them with an "instant enemy". Use these powers wisely, because they may have unexpected results! As you guide your Sims through life, you can complete challenges to unlock additional items, new buildings and landmarks.

Create over a million unique Sims and control their lives. Customize everything from their appearances, to their personalities and even the home of their dreams. Then, send your Sims out to explore new locations around town and to meet other Sims in the neighborhood. With all-new quick challenges and rewarding game play, The Sims 3 gives you the freedom to choose whether (or not!) to fulfill your Sims’ destinies and make their wishes come true.

Powerful character design tools let you make exactly who you want. Robust building features allow for precise control over your Sims' home. And your Sims can explore a huge neighborhood to their heart’s content. Day or night, work or play, the world is your Sims' oyster.

It’s easy and fun to make your unique Sims look just right. From the face and body shaping options to the vast and ever-growing range of clothing choices to the intriguing personality types, you can create the character of your dreams… or even make yourself!

Sims can roam freely throughout the town. Visit the local bistro, check out the new nightclub, get a few reps in at the gym, whatever strikes your Sims' fancy is theirs to pursue… and they’ll never have to wait in line!

Whether or not you believe in destiny, you can help your Sims achieve their dreams. During their lifetimes, Sims will want different things based on their individual personality traits. Fulfilling these desires gets you points to spend purchasing new items for your Sims. And it’ll give you a nice warm feeling, too.

game.title: Terraforming Mars
game.description:
In the 2400s, mankind begins to terraform the planet Mars. Giant corporations, sponsored by the World Government on Earth, initiate huge projects to raise the temperature, the oxygen level, and the ocean coverage until the environment is habitable. In Terraforming Mars, you play one of those corporations and work together in the terraforming process, but compete for getting victory points that are awarded not only for your contribution to the terraforming, but also for advancing human infrastructure throughout the solar system, and doing other commendable things.

As a player, you acquire unique project cards (from over two hundred different ones) by buying them to your hand. The cards can give you immediate bonuses, as well as increasing your production of different resources. Many cards also have requirements and they become playable when the temperature, oxygen, or ocean coverage increases enough. Buying cards is costly, so there is a balance between buying cards and actually playing them. Standard Projects are always available to complement your hand of cards. Your basic income, as well as your basic score, are based on your Terraform Rating. However, your income is boosted by your production, and VPs are also gained from many other sources.

You keep track of your production and resources on your player board.  The game uses six types of resources: MegaCredits, Steel, Titanium, Plants, Energy, and Heat. On the game board, you compete for the best places for your city tiles, ocean tiles, and greenery tiles. You also compete for different Milestones and Awards worth many VPs. Each round is called a generation and consists of the following phases:

1) Player order shifts clockwise.
2) Research phase: All players buy cards from four privately drawn.
3) Action phase: Players take turns doing 1-2 actions from these options: Playing a card, claiming a Milestone, funding an Award, using a Standard project, converting plant into greenery tiles (and raising oxygen), converting heat into a temperature raise, and using the action of a card in play. The turn continues around the table (sometimes several laps) until all players have passed.
4) Production phase: Players get resources according to their terraform rating and production parameters.

When the three global parameters (temperature, oxygen, ocean) have all reached their required levels, the terraforming is complete, and the game ends after that generation. Combine your Terraform Rating and other VPs to determine the winning corporation!

localized_title.text: Terraforming Mars: Ο Αποικισμός Του Άρη
พลิกพิภพดาวอังคาร
テラフォーミング・マーズ

game.title: Clicker Heroes
game.description: Ever wondered what one quadrillion damage per second feels like? Wonder no more! Embark on your quest to attain it today! Start out by clicking on the monster to kill them, and get their gold. Spend that gold on hiring new heroes and get more damage. The more damage you deal, the more gold you will get.

game.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
game.description:
Lead the members of Expedition 33 on their quest to destroy the Paintress so that she can never paint death again. Explore a world of wonders inspired by Belle Époque France and battle unique enemies in this turn-based RPG with real-time mechanics.

“Year by year, She erases us.”

Once a year, the Paintress wakes and paints upon her monolith. Paints her cursed number. And everyone of that age turns to smoke and fades away. Year by year, that number ticks down and more of us are erased. Tomorrow she’ll wake and paint “33.” And tomorrow we depart on our final mission - Destroy the Paintress, so she can never paint death again.

We are Expedition 33.
